title: Fish Species Recognition Challenge
description: Classify fish species from images using machine learning. Participants are given labelled training images and must predict the species of unseen test images.
description_zh: 使用机器学习从图像中分类鱼类物种。参赛者获得标记的训练图像，必须预测未见过的测试图像的物种。

pages.title: Challenge Overview
pages.content:
# Fish Species Recognition Challenge

## Overview

Welcome to the Fish Species Recognition Challenge! Your task is to build a classifier that identifies fish species from images.

You will be provided with:
- A **training set** of labelled fish images (species name for each image)
- A **test set** of unlabelled fish images used in both the development and final phases

Download the full dataset from the link provided in the "How to Participate" page.

## Task

Given a fish image, predict its species label. Submissions are JSON files mapping image filenames to predicted species names.

## Evaluation

Submissions are scored by **classification accuracy** — the fraction of test images whose predicted species matches the ground truth label. Predictions are matched to ground truth **by image filename key**, so ordering does not matter.

## Data Format

**Training labels** (`train_labels.json`):
```json
{
  "train/img_001.jpg": "salmon",
  "train/img_002.jpg": "tuna"
}
```

**Submission file** (`prediction.json`) — one entry per test image:
```json
{
  "img_001.jpg": "salmon",
  "img_002.jpg": "tuna",
  "img_003.jpg": "bass"
}
```

## Getting Started

Download the starting kit from the Development Phase page for an example submission and baseline code.
pages.content_zh:
# 鱼类物种识别挑战赛

## 概述

欢迎参加鱼类物种识别挑战赛！您的任务是构建一个分类器，从图像中识别鱼类物种。

您将获得：
- **训练集**：标注了物种名称的鱼类图像
- **测试集**：未标注的鱼类图像，用于开发阶段和最终阶段

从"如何参赛"页面提供的链接下载完整数据集。

## 任务

根据鱼类图像预测其物种标签。提交内容为JSON文件，映射图像文件名到预测的物种名称。

## 评估方法

提交内容根据**分类准确率**进行评分——测试图像中预测物种与真实标签匹配的比例。预测结果通过**图像文件名键**与真实标签匹配，因此顺序无关。

## 数据格式

**训练标签**（`train_labels.json`）：
```json
{
  "train/img_001.jpg": "salmon",
  "train/img_002.jpg": "tuna"
}
```

**提交文件**（`prediction.json`）——每个测试图像一条记录：
```json
{
  "img_001.jpg": "salmon",
  "img_002.jpg": "tuna",
  "img_003.jpg": "bass"
}
```

## 快速开始

从开发阶段页面下载入门工具包，其中包括示例提交和基础代码。

pages.title: How to Participate
pages.content:
# How to Participate

## 1. Download the Dataset

Download the fish image dataset from Google Drive: **[TODO: insert your Google Drive link here]**

The archive contains:
- `train/` — training images organised into subfolders by species
- `train_labels.json` — mapping of image filename → species label
- `test/` — test images (no labels)

## 2. Build Your Model

Train a fish species classifier on the training data. You are free to use any framework (PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, etc.) and any pre-trained backbone.

## 3. Format Your Predictions

Create a file named `prediction.json` mapping each test image filename to your predicted species label:

```json
{
  "img_001.jpg": "salmon",
  "img_002.jpg": "tuna",
  "img_003.jpg": "bass",
  "img_004.jpg": "herring"
}
```

Every key in the ground truth must appear in your submission — extra keys are ignored, missing keys cause an error.

## 4. Submit

Zip your prediction file and upload it:

```bash
zip submission.zip prediction.json
```

Then upload `submission.zip` on the Development Phase page.

## 5. Phases

- **Development Phase**: submit as many times as you like to tune your model.
- **Final Evaluation Phase**: one submission only. Choose your best model carefully.

See the **Timeline** page for deadlines.
pages.content_zh:
# 参与方式

## 1. 下载数据集

从 Google Drive 下载鱼类图像数据集：**[TODO: 在此插入您的 Google Drive 链接]**

压缩包包含：
- `train/` — 训练图像，按物种分类到子文件夹
- `train_labels.json` — 图像文件名到物种标签的映射
- `test/` — 测试图像（无标签）

## 2. 构建您的模型

在训练数据上训练鱼类物种分类器。您可以自由使用任何框架（PyTorch、TensorFlow、scikit-learn 等）和任何预训练骨干网络。

## 3. 格式化您的预测

创建名为 `prediction.json` 的文件，将每个测试图像文件名映射到您预测的物种标签：

```json
{
  "img_001.jpg": "salmon",
  "img_002.jpg": "tuna",
  "img_003.jpg": "bass",
  "img_004.jpg": "herring"
}
```

基准真值中的每个键都必须出现在您的提交中 — 额外的键将被忽略，缺少的键将导致错误。

## 4. 提交

压缩您的预测文件并上传：

```bash
zip submission.zip prediction.json
```

然后在开发阶段页面上上传 `submission.zip`。

## 5. 阶段

- **开发阶段**：可多次提交以调整您的模型。
- **最终评估阶段**：仅一次提交机会。请仔细选择您最好的模型。

有关截止日期，请参阅**时间表**页面。

pages.title: Timeline
pages.content:
# Timeline

## Development Phase
**Start:** TODO — set to your workshop start date

**End:** TODO — set to your submission deadline

During this phase you can submit as many times as you like. Your predictions are scored against a public development test set and results appear on the leaderboard immediately.

Use this phase to iterate on your model and check your score before the final deadline.

## Final Evaluation Phase
**Start:** TODO — after the development phase closes

During this phase you may submit **once**. Predictions are scored against a hidden test set that was not available during development. Your final rank is determined by this score.
pages.content_zh:
# 时间表

## 开发阶段
**开始：** TODO — 设置为您的工作坊开始日期

**结束：** TODO — 设置为您的提交截止日期

在此阶段，您可以提交任意次数。您的预测将针对公开开发测试集进行评分，结果立即显示在排行榜上。

使用此阶段迭代您的模型，并在最终截止日期前检查您的分数。

## 最终评估阶段
**开始：** TODO — 开发阶段关闭后

在此阶段，您只能提交**一次**。预测将针对开发期间未提供的隐藏测试集进行评分。您的最终排名由该分数决定。
